sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90469" key="prote/gisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προτέγισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n90469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eaves</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.81</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
